name: TIRI
title: THE NOMAD

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Horizon's Call
abilities.text: If this model has a Shielded token, it may ignore terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Written in the Sky
abilities.text: When this model is on terrain of Ht 2 or greater, it may increase the Rg of its actions by +4".

actions.name: Earthquake
actions.effects: Enemy models within (pulse)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage. Move models damaged by this action up to 2".

triggers.name: The Nomad's Path
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded and Insight token.

triggers.name: Stinging Sand
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (pulse) of this action by 2". Models damaged by this action gain a Distracted token.

actions.name: Off the Path
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Other ally only.
actions.effects: Discard up to two cards. For each card discarded, draw a card and move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Voice of the Aua
triggers.text: Target declares an action. The generated action receives +(m) to its Skl.

triggers.name: Tireless March
triggers.text: Move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE NOMAD' back='The Nomad'
